statement.informal: Any `ceml` composition has positive depth — at least 1, the contribution of the `ceml` node itself. This formalises the intuition that `ceml` is never free: every `ceml` costs one routing step. (with constant 0 promoted to a parameter k8)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem depth_ceml_pos (k8 : ℕ) (t₁ t₂ : EMLTree) :
    k8 < (EMLTree.ceml t₁ t₂).depth

tactics:
theorem depth_ceml_pos (t₁ t₂ : EMLTree) :
    0 < (EMLTree.ceml t₁ t₂).depth := by
  simp [EMLTree.depth]

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
